mapper.sql: id, title, content, publisher_id, publish_time, expire_time, status, top_status, view_count, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM announcement
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY top_status DESC, publish_time DESC

SELECT
FROM announcement WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY top_status DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publisher_id, publish_time, expire_time, status, top_status, view_count, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{publishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{topStatus}, #{viewCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, status = #{status}, top_status = #{topStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
